content.text: **Requirement**: **MANDATORY for ALL agent work**
content.originalHeader: Agent Validation System / Development Validation (< 2 minutes) - MANDATORY

content.text: 1. **NEVER IMPLEMENT UNLESS ASKED** - No unsolicited changes
content.originalHeader: Agent Constraints (Prevent Costly Mistakes)

content.text: 2. **ALWAYS VERIFY IN SOURCE CODE** - No hallucinations accepted
content.originalHeader: Agent Constraints (Prevent Costly Mistakes)

content.text: 3. **MINIMIZE DIFF** - Smallest possible changes
content.originalHeader: Agent Constraints (Prevent Costly Mistakes)

content.text: 4. **NO WORKAROUNDS** - Fix root causes, not symptoms
content.originalHeader: Agent Constraints (Prevent Costly Mistakes)

content.text: 5. **REAL TESTING ONLY** - No simulated results accepted
content.originalHeader: Agent Constraints (Prevent Costly Mistakes)

content.text:
**BEFORE making ANY changes, ask yourself:**
1. "Does this already exist?" → Use `grep -r "feature_name" .`
2. "Will this break existing agent commands?" → Test `yarn agent:dev compression ios`
3. "Is this a protected file?" → Check the protected files list below
4. "Did I test both platforms?" → Run Android AND iOS validation
5. "Are there TypeScript/lint errors?" → ALWAYS run `yarn typecheck && yarn lint:fix`
content.originalHeader: AI Agent Memory & Learning / 🧠 Quick Reference for Future AI Agents

content.text:
**✅ SAFE TO MODIFY**: New files in `src/`, new stories, new E2E tests
**🚨 DANGER ZONE**: Anything in `scripts/`, `.detoxrc.js`, root `/index.js`, package.json agent scripts
content.originalHeader: AI Agent Memory & Learning / 🧠 Quick Reference for Future AI Agents

content.text: **❌ NEVER**: Delete or modify the monorepo root `/index.js` file - it's critical for Storybook
content.originalHeader: Critical Implementation Lessons / Lesson 1: Storybook v9 Integration Complexities

content.text: **✅ ALWAYS**: Use `yarn build:deps` before any Storybook development

content.text:
**❌ NEVER**: Change simulator selection without updating ALL references in:
  - `.detoxrc.js`
  - `scripts/setup-simulators.sh`
  - `scripts/generate-screenshots.sh`
content.originalHeader: Critical Implementation Lessons / Lesson 2: Device Configuration Consistency

content.text: **❌ NEVER**: Modify core `scripts/agent.sh` without understanding full validation flow

content.originalHeader: Critical Implementation Lessons / Lesson 4: Cross-Platform Test Differences

content.text: **❌ NEVER**: Add new functionality without checking for existing implementations

content.originalHeader: Critical Implementation Lessons / Lesson 5: Documentation vs Implementation Gaps

content.text: **❌ NEVER**: Create E2E test files without proper Jest imports
content.originalHeader: Critical Implementation Lessons / Lesson 6: TypeScript Jest Configuration

content.text: **✅ ALWAYS**: Copy import structure from existing working E2E tests
content.originalHeader: Critical Implementation Lessons / Lesson 6: TypeScript Jest Configuration

content.text: **🚨 MANDATORY**: Run `yarn typecheck && yarn lint:fix` after creating any new test files
content.originalHeader: Critical Implementation Lessons / Lesson 6: TypeScript Jest Configuration

content.text:
**🔒 PROTECTED FILES:**
- `/index.js` (monorepo root) - Critical for Storybook module resolution
- `apps/playground/.rnstorybook/storybook.requires.ts` - Auto-generated, only update via `sb-rn-get-stories`
- `apps/playground/.detoxrc.js` - Device configurations used across ALL tests
- `apps/playground/scripts/agent.sh` - Core agentic framework script
content.originalHeader: Critical Implementation Lessons / Lesson 7: Critical Files - DO NOT MODIFY

content.text:
**🔒 PROTECTED PATTERNS:**
- Any script that starts with `yarn agent:` in package.json
- Simulator device names in any configuration files
- Metro/bundler configuration related to Storybook
- E2E test timeout values and screenshot configurations
content.originalHeader: Critical Implementation Lessons / Lesson 7: Critical Files - DO NOT MODIFY

content.text:
**🚨 BEFORE MODIFYING PROTECTED FILES:**
1. Create backup: `cp file.js file.js.backup`
2. Test change on single platform first
3. Verify ALL existing agent commands still work
4. Test both Android and iOS platforms
5. Check that screenshots still capture properly
6. **MANDATORY**: Run `yarn typecheck && yarn lint:fix` after ANY code changes
content.originalHeader: Critical Implementation Lessons / Lesson 7: Critical Files - DO NOT MODIFY

content.text: **DO NOT RE-IMPLEMENT THESE FEATURES - THEY WORK PERFECTLY**
content.originalHeader: AI Agent Memory & Learning / ✅ COMPLETED IMPLEMENTATIONS (DO NOT DUPLICATE)

content.text: **🚨 MANDATORY: Read this section before ANY modifications to prevent repeating mistakes**
content.originalHeader: Critical Implementation Lessons (MUST READ FOR ALL AI AGENTS)

content.text:
- Import Jest globals from `@jest/globals`: `import { beforeAll, afterAll, describe, it, expect as jestExpected } from '@jest/globals'`
- Import Detox separately: `import { by, element, expect as detoxExpected, device, waitFor } from 'detox'`
- Follow exact pattern from existing `e2e/agent-validation.test.ts`
content.originalHeader: Critical Implementation Lessons / Lesson 6: TypeScript Jest Configuration

content.text:
- Created platform-specific test adaptations in `e2e/storybook-validation.test.ts`
- Used try/catch blocks for timing-sensitive elements
- Maintained consistent screenshot capture across platforms
content.originalHeader: Critical Implementation Lessons / Lesson 4: Cross-Platform Test Differences

content.text: - Always run `yarn build:deps` in playground before development
content.originalHeader: Important Notes

content.text: - Git LFS setup required for ONNX models
content.originalHeader: Important Notes

content.text: - Native changes require pod install (iOS) or gradle sync (Android)
content.originalHeader: Important Notes

content.text: - Use absolute paths in test scripts
content.originalHeader: Important Notes

content.text: - **VPN Interference**: Disconnect VPNs during iOS E2E tests; Android uses ADB port forwarding (VPN-resistant)
content.originalHeader: Important Notes

content.text: - **Background recording requires special permissions configuration**
content.originalHeader: Important Notes

content.text: **Requirement**: **NOT required for agent completion**
content.originalHeader: Agent Validation System / Full Validation (5-10 minutes) - OPTIONAL

content.text:
If multiple simulators are running:
1. **Identify target**: Detox will use the first matching device type
2. **Explicit shutdown**: Close unwanted simulators for consistency  
3. **Check logs**: Detox output shows which simulator was selected
content.originalHeader: iOS Simulator Configuration / Troubleshooting Multiple Simulators

content.text:
- All screenshot scripts use iPhone 16 Pro Max (6.9" display)
- App Store preparation uses same simulator
- Agent validation maintains cross-platform consistency
content.originalHeader: iOS Simulator Configuration / Consistency Notes

content.text: The agentic framework uses **iPhone 16 Pro Max** as the standard iOS simulator for consistency across all tests and validations.
content.originalHeader: iOS Simulator Configuration / Default Simulator Setup

content.text:
Simulator selection is controlled in `.detoxrc.js`:
- **Primary**: `ios.sim.debug` → iPhone 16 Pro Max
- **Alternative**: `ios.iPadPro.debug` → iPad Pro 13-inch (M4)
content.originalHeader: iOS Simulator Configuration / Detox Configuration

content.originalHeader: Critical Implementation Lessons / Lesson 1: Storybook v9 Integration Complexities

content.text:
- **Build automated feedback loops** - the absolute key to unlock automated improvements
- **Quality over speed** - Protect your team from AI mistakes  
- **Real testing over mocked** - Validate actual functionality works
- **Fast iteration** - < 2 minutes to prove features work
